claim_text: Unipile is GDPR gold-standard: Scaleway France hosting, SOC2 Type II + CASA Tier 2, AES-256-GCM, no transfer outside EU, named FR controller, signable Art.28 DPA, 30-day deletion after termination.
Unipile is a real French company founded 2020, with maintained official multi-language SDKs and active changelog — not bus factor 1.
Unipile API natively covers the If-Connection loop: invite, new_relation acceptance webhook, relation/degree status, accept/decline/withdraw, DM/InMail, Sales Nav/Recruiter.
Unipile DX is agent-native: llms.txt + OpenAPI explicitly for AI agents, TypeScript SDK, no-code interactive testing, Make/n8n integrations, 7-day free trial.
Unipile is 49 EUR/month flat for 1 LinkedIn account (up to 10 accounts), unlimited API calls, no hidden credits.
Unipile remains session/cookie-based (ToS-gray); ban-risk non-zero, managed by cadence not by the tool. Unipile relays but does not lift LinkedIn rate limits.
Aggregated third-party reviews (G2/Trustpilot) for Unipile are near-absent; UX evidence rests on directly inspectable docs/SDK/OpenAPI rather than ratings.
Verdict: GO on Unipile. All blocking gates pass at equal price; the only real trade-off vs BeReach is build effort (API vs turnkey), offset by Victor's profile + agent-native DX.
